The '''mmhmm butterfly''' was an [[Insect/Legends|insect]] native to the jungles of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Baskarn]]. They sometimes covered every [[Tree/Legends|tree]] and [[Bush/Legends|bush]] in sight in the jungle. The mmhmm [[Butterfly/Legends|butterflies]] served as a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] source for the native [[Yrashu]] people and could be picked like ripe [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]]. The body of the insect was [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]], but its wings were considered sweet.<ref name="WotY" />

==Behind the scenes==
The mmhmm butterfly was first mentioned in "[[The Way of the Yrashu]]," an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Dustin Browder]] that was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] in [[May]] [[1994]].<ref name="WotY" />
